launch_inputs.incident_summary: The alerting service is paging continuously because failed webhook deliveries are looping without honoring the circuit-breaker cooldown.
launch_inputs.urgency_context: Operations needs a same-day stabilization plan before the next on-call shift, but the fix must not disable legitimate escalation delivery.
launch_inputs.acceptable_risk_bounds: Prefer a reversible change with explicit rollback steps and clear monitoring guidance.

launch_inputs.incident_summary: Webhook retries are stampeding the alerting service and the current mitigation window closes before the overnight rotation starts.
launch_inputs.urgency_context: The hotfix needs an operator approval gate because support, SRE, and release all have to align on the rollback posture.
launch_inputs.acceptable_risk_bounds: The fix can degrade retry aggressiveness temporarily, but must preserve audited delivery records and clear rollback notes.
